scripts.check: node --check main.js && node --check renderer.js && node --check preload.js && node --check conversation-providers.js && node --check identity-utils.js && node --check capability-utils.js && node --check source-utils.js && node --check emote-utils.js && node --check speech-utils.js && node --check stream-utils.js && node --check holiday-utils.js && node --check apikey.js && node --check data.js && node scripts/check-identity-utils.js && node scripts/check-capability-utils.js && node scripts/check-source-utils.js && node scripts/check-emote-utils.js && node scripts/check-speech-utils.js && node scripts/check-stream-utils.js && node scripts/check-holiday-utils.js
scripts.package: npm run build-app-icon && node scripts/package-universal.mjs --arm64 && codesign --force --deep --sign - 'dist/びくたん-darwin-arm64/びくたん.app'
scripts.build-media-helper: xcrun clang -fblocks -framework Foundation native/now-playing.m -o native/now-playing -arch arm64 -arch x86_64
scripts.package:universal: npm run build-app-icon && node scripts/package-universal.mjs && codesign --force --deep --sign - 'dist/びくたん-darwin-universal/びくたん.app'
